title: keylime security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[7.12.1-15]
- Registrar allows identity takeover via duplicate UUID registration

[7.12.1-14]
- Properly fix malformed TPM certificates workaround

[7.12.1-13]
- Avoid opening /dev/stdout when printing

[7.12.1-12]
- Fix malformed TPM certificates workaround
full_text:
[7.12.1-15]
- Registrar allows identity takeover via duplicate UUID registration

[7.12.1-14]
- Properly fix malformed TPM certificates workaround

[7.12.1-13]
- Avoid opening /dev/stdout when printing

[7.12.1-12]
- Fix malformed TPM certificates workaround

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23201.html
